headline: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables
summary: A new free Mac app identifies USB-C cable capabilities. It tests speed, power delivery, and overall performance. This replaces a discontinued hardware tester for Apple Silicon Macs.

headline: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
summary: The EU is considering strict social media rules for young people. Proposals include age limits, outright bans, and phased access. Platforms may need to prove safety before youth usage.

headline: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
summary: Waze is integrating Google's Gemini AI assistant for personalized trips. New AI-powered features aim to enhance the driving app experience. Updates include improvements to conversation reporting.

headline: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary: Lorde publicly criticized AI smartglasses during a festival performance. She likely targeted Ray-Ban Meta glasses, a festival sponsor. The singer deemed the AI-powered eyewear "not sexy."

headline: PlayStation criticized for move to kill physical game discs
summary: A retailer association slams Sony for ending physical PlayStation discs. The move is labeled "corporate convenience over consumer choice." Backlash intensifies over the future of disc-based gaming.

headline: Digger Trailer Reveals Tom Cruise in What May Be His Least Recognizable Role Ever
summary: The "Digger" trailer features Tom Cruise in an unrecognizable role. Cruise plays an aging CEO tasked with saving the planet. The film explores a natural disaster he inadvertently caused.

headline: Tom Cruise Says Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s 'Totally Original' Digger Is Unlike Any Film He’s Ever Made
summary: Tom Cruise praises Alejandro G. Iñárritu's film "Digger" as "totally original." He highlights the film's challenging nature and intricate details. Cruise claims "Digger" is unlike any other movie he has ever made.

headline: Lin-Manuel Miranda reveals rejected MCU Spider-Man role
summary: Lin-Manuel Miranda nearly appeared in "Spider-Man: Homecoming." The "Hamilton" creator revealed he turned down a surprising role. He felt he would have been "miscast" for the MCU part.

headline: Counter terrorism police take over investigation into Ann Widdecombe's death
summary: Counter terrorism police are now investigating Ann Widdecombe's death. A man in custody was re-arrested on suspicion of terrorism acts. The police probe suggests a potential terrorism link to her death.

headline: Twelve arrested over alleged right-wing terror threat to UK Islamic event
summary: Twelve individuals arrested concerning a right-wing terror threat. The alleged plot targeted a UK Islamic event. Home Secretary says police action "undoubtedly saved lives."

headline: Heatwave to intensify in second week as wildfires burn across UK
summary: UK heatwave expected to intensify further in its second week. High temperatures and humidity are forecast to build again. Wildfires are currently burning across various parts of the UK.

headline: Sam Neill, versatile actor known for 'Jurassic Park,' dies at 78
summary: Sam Neill, renowned actor, has died at the age of 78. He had a celebrated five-decade career with numerous screen credits. Neill was known for diverse roles beyond his iconic "Jurassic Park" character.
